title: Shutterstock Image Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for Shutterstock stock image objects returned from the API

fields.name: description
fields.description: Text description of the image content

fields.name: is_editorial
fields.description: True if the image requires an editorial license (news/documentary use only)

fields.name: is_adult
fields.description: True if the image contains adult content

fields.name: is_illustration
fields.description: True if the image is an illustration or vector art

fields.name: media_type
fields.description: Type of media (always 'image' for image results)

fields.name: added_date
fields.description: Date the image was first added to Shutterstock (YYYY-MM-DD)

fields.name: contributor
fields.description: The photographer or artist who created and uploaded the image

fields.name: assets
fields.description: Available resolution and format variants for download

fields.name: categories
fields.description: Shutterstock content categories assigned to this image

fields.name: keywords
fields.description: Search keywords describing the image content and context

fields.name: releases
fields.description: Model and property release documents for this image

fields.name: search_id
fields.description: Unique search session ID for tracking
